3030560.name: Sloppy Forgeries
3030560.description:
Copy the Mona Lisa! With a mouse! In three minutes! "That's impossible," you say?! Yes.

But wait! There's more! You get:

🎨 4-6 colors! 🙂

🖌️ 3 brush sizes! Medium, big, and too big! 😐

🚫 No undo! 😡

🚫 No fill! 🤬

🎯 A score based on every pixel you paint! 💯 😂

◇─◇──◇────────────────────────────────◇──◇─◇

Practice your skills by brutally butchering iconic masterpieces in one of the few drawing games that measures accuracy pixel-by-pixel in real-time. 🫠

◇─◇──◇────────────────────────────────◇──◇─◇

   

Have an art degree and are thinking, "Now what?" Or can't draw, but want to laugh at bad art with friends? Well, grab a mouse, choose from 30+ meticulously abstracted paintings from art history and get to work.

PARTY MODES!

  • Mouse-v-Mouse Local Multiplayer!?! Have two mice laying around? No? Well tell your friends it's BYOM and go head-to-head on the same computer. 🐭🐭*

  • Online Multiplayer. Use a join code to play with up for four friends online. 🌍

  • Random Modifiers. Play with absurd modifiers like: "Baby Brush," "From Memory," and "X, Y Flip." 🛠️

  • Four-Mouse Crazy Collaborative Mode. Have four mice laying around?! Enough ports? Probably not, but it'd be a lot cooler if you did. 'Cause you could go 2v2, two people per canvas. 🐭🐭🐭🐭*

PAINTING FEATURES!

  • Assist Tools. Use time-limited tools to help you spot differences (e.g., pins, grids) 📍

  • Real-time Feedback. See an accuracy bar go up and down as you paint. 📈

  • Keyboard Shortcuts. Get all hackery and use keyboard shortcuts for everything, most things, some things. ⌨️

  • Pretty Music. Listen to 8+ randomly-selected fast-paced piano songs that end dramatically to keep you focused. It even messes up sometimes. Like you. 🎹

SINGLE PLAYER MODE!

  • Painting Archive. View a collection of every forgery you make in-game (stored locally). 🏛️

  • Steam Leaderboards. Compete for the best accuracy score per-painting and view a gallery of the best forgeries in-game. 📊

  • Time-Lapse Replays. Relive each stroke of your masterpiece via time lapse replays. 🔁

  • Share performances. Download and share replays as animated GIFs. 📤

  • Campaign Mode. Have some ideas, but not 100% what form this will take. 👤

*Windows Only
3030560.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
